mapper.select:
SELECT c.comment_num, c.parent_cmt, c.board_num, c.emp_num, LPAD(' ', 4 * LEVEL) || c.cmt_content AS cmt_content, LEVEL, e.ename FROM cmt c JOIN emp e ON c.emp_num = e.emp_num WHERE c.board_num = #{board_num}
START WITH c.parent_cmt IS NULL CONNECT BY PRIOR c.comment_num = c.parent_cmt ORDER SIBLINGS BY c.comment_num
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cmt ( comment_num, parent_cmt, cmt_content, writed_at, comment_status, board_num, emp_num ) VALUES ( cmt_seq.NEXTVAL, #{parent_cmt}, #{cmt_content}, SYSDATE, 'N', #{board_num}, #{emp_num} )
